name: La Vinya del Senyor
summary: Classic Barcelona wine bar by Santa Maria del Mar, useful for a lower-commitment El Born wine stop.
whyItMatters: It offers a wine-focused alternative to destination cocktail bars, in an area travelers are likely to visit anyway.
pros: Food & Wine identifies it at Placa de Santa Maria 5 and praises the wine selection and by-the-glass quality.
El Pais 2025 wine-bar coverage describes it as a long-running Born wine bar with broad Spanish, Catalan, international, and sherry selection.
cons: Touristy square location can mean crowds.
Needs official/current-hours verification before final promotion.

logistics.distance_from_base: Unknown until Barcelona lodging is fixed.
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Not a Montjuic support stop; use for an evening in El Born.
logistics.transit: Walkable in El Born/Gothic Quarter; verify from lodging.
logistics.road_closure_notes: Verify Barcelona race-day mobility before relying on taxis.

timing.best_visit_window: Early evening before or after dinner in El Born.
timing.race_day_risk: Medium on Barcelona race days due to crowding and city movement.

sources.title: Food & Wine - Where To Go Next in Barcelona
sources.note: Supports address, location by Santa Maria del Mar, and wine-selection reputation.
